text.message: Bro
sis
I can do nb with 1:1
My ore is blocked
what a deal
Not really
I traded 4 sheep to get that brick
well u have a city now
Only reason I did the trade
wood nb
Haven’t had wood since the first round
Can do next
Did you not believe me?
Getting plundered lol
Sorry about that
It was close between you and black
well it seems very well balanced so far doesnt it?
No, I think all three of you are wasaaay ahead of me
So make sure you steal from the others ;)
Black why
Targeting you now
Sheep nb
to avoid u becoming too strong?
Yes
ok
u will have massive dev prod
It was an unnecessary plow
And hopefully I’ll be able to make you pay for your insolence
i think we have 2 different points of view here
dont see y i should let u become even more strong
You’re entitled to your wrong (and downright evils) opinion
u will dominte us all on the long run
10 wheat
7 ore
Red is in the lead here
Idc who is in the lead anymore
Blue come on mate, I didn’t do anything to your game
Will be stealing from black
blue is so childish
Green, black had no cards
And if they don’t have cards steal the leader
i am pretty sure u will win this game
No black, you are evil and unnecessarily cruel
i explained myself
u play childish
And now you have to pay
And I explained that your explanation is garbage water
and he is getting away with it
crazy
I’d rather play childish than cruel and unusual like you
But it’s not childish to make a bully pay
stop crying baby u r in the lead
lol green
Yeah?
I almost feel sorry for you black
You are so misguided
But then I remember how you plowed me
And I have no sympathy for you anymore
love u too sweatheart <3
DUDE
game over
Green I’m still behind black
Black
By a large margin
Can you do this?
no wheatn
hahaha sooo bad
red r u blue's little sister?
We really don’t have to be toxic
That’s all black knows how to be
All three of you are being toxic tbh
blue u started the tr a sh talk
Uh
No you started it with your shtttty plow
i plowed u and i stick to that move
cause i still think it was useful
And I still know you’re an a hole
cause i dont let u win easily, lol
Bc you didn’t need to plow and did anyway just to be a dck
get over it, sis
Nope
u r still in good position to win
Any brick for me to fight road?
@9 points
And so?
I’m always in a good position to win
I’m literally the best Catan player in the world
Why wouldn’t I be in a good position lmao
if u r that good, the plow was even more useful
First thing you’ve said that was true
wow i won against the best player in the world
what and honor
thanks at all, gg
and peace for the next one
Gg
